item.name: New...
item.help: Create a new map.

item.name: Open...
item.help: Open another map.

item.name: Save
item.help: Save the current map.

item.name: Save As...
item.help: Save the current map as a new file.

item.name: Generate Map
item.help: Generate a new map.

item.name: Close
item.help: Closes the currently open map.

item.name: Import Map...
item.help: Import map data from another map file.

item.name: Import Monsters/NPC...
item.help: Import either a monsters.xml file or a specific monster/NPC.

item.name: Import Minimap...
item.help: Import map data from a .bmp file.

item.name: Export Minimap...
item.help: Export minimap to an image file.

item.name: Export Tilesets...
item.help: Export tilesets to an xml file.

item.name: Reload Data
item.help: Reloads all data files.

item.name: Preferences
item.help: Configure the map editor.

item.name: Exit
item.help: Close the editor.

item.name: Undo
item.help: Undo last action.

item.name: Redo
item.help: Redo last undid action.

item.name: Cut
item.help: Cut a part of the map.

item.name: Copy
item.help: Copy a part of the map.

item.name: Paste
item.help: Paste a part of the map.

item.name: Move Selection Up
item.help: Moves the selected area up one floor.

item.name: Move Selection Down
item.help: Moves the selected area down one floor.

item.name: Replace Items...
item.help: Replaces all occurrences of one item with another.

item.name: Border Automagic
item.help: Turns on all automatic border functions.

item.name: Borderize Selection
item.help: Creates automatic borders in the entire selected area.

item.name: Borderize Map
item.help: Reborders the entire map.

item.name: Randomize Selection
item.help: Randomizes the ground tiles of the selected area.

item.name: Randomize Map
item.help: Randomizes all tiles of the entire map.

item.name: Remove Items by ID...
item.help: Removes all items with the selected ID from the map.

item.name: Remove all Corpses...
item.help: Removes all corpses from the map.

item.name: Remove all Unreachable Tiles...
item.help: Removes all tiles that cannot be reached (or seen) by the player from the map.

item.name: Clear Invalid Houses
item.help: Clears house tiles not belonging to any house.

item.name: Clear Modified State
item.help: Clears the modified state from all tiles.

item.name: New View
item.help: Creates a new view of the current map.

item.name: Enter Fullscreen
item.help: Changes between fullscreen mode and windowed mode.

item.name: Take Screenshot
item.help: Saves the current view to the disk.

item.name: Zoom In
item.help: Increase the zoom.

item.name: Zoom Out
item.help: Decrease the zoom.

item.name: Zoom Normal
item.help: Normal zoom (100%).

item.name: Brushes
item.help: Show or hide the Brushes toolbar.

item.name: Position
item.help: Show or hide the Position toolbar.

item.name: Sizes
item.help: Show or hide the Sizes toolbar.

item.name: Standard
item.help: Show or hide the Standard toolbar.

item.name: Tools
item.help: Show or hide the Tools panel in the palette.

item.name: Brush Size
item.help: Show or hide the Brush Size panel in the palette.

item.name: Ghost Loose Items
item.help: Ghost items (except ground).

item.name: Ghost Items on Void
item.help: Ghost items that are on tiles without ground.

item.name: Ghost Higher Floors
item.help: Ghost floors above the current floor.

item.name: Show All Floors
item.help: If not checked, other floors are hidden.

item.name: Show All Floors Underground
item.help: When underground, show every floor below instead of only two floors down. Uncheck to disable.

item.name: Show Shade
item.help: Shade lower floors.

item.name: Show as Minimap
item.help: Show only the tile minimap colors.

item.name: Only Show Colors
item.help: Show only the special tiles on the map.

item.name: Only Show Modified
item.help: Show only tiles modified since the map was opened.

item.name: Show Grid
item.help: Shows a grid over all items.

item.name: Show Tile Coordinates
item.help: Display map coordinates overlay on the current floor.

item.name: Show HUD
item.help: Show an on-canvas overlay with the current position, floor and zoom.

item.name: Show Autoborder Indicator
item.help: Show an on-canvas indicator when Automagic (autoborder) is enabled.

item.name: Show Client Box
item.help: Shadows out areas not visible ingame (from the center of the screen).

item.name: Show Invisible Items
item.help: Show helper icons on invisible items.

item.name: Extended House Shader
item.help: Draw house brush on walls and items.

item.name: Show Tooltips
item.help: Show tooltips.

item.name: Show Tooltip Key Number
item.help: Show key number in tooltips.

item.name: Show Tooltip Door Properties
item.help: Show door properties (key hole, level, quest) in tooltips.

item.name: Show Animation
item.help: Show item animations.

item.name: Show Light
item.help: Show lights.

item.name: Show Light Strength
item.help: Show indicators of light strength.

item.name: Show Technical Items
item.help: Shows special items that are not visible in game.

item.name: Show Zones
item.help: Show zones on the map.

item.name: Always Show Zones
item.help: Zones will be visible even on empty tiles.

item.name: Show Creatures
item.help: Show creatures on the map.

item.name: Show Creature Spawn Time
item.help: Show the spawn time values on creatures.

item.name: Show Spawns
item.help: Show spawns on the map.

item.name: Show Special
item.help: Show special tiles on the map, like PZ.

item.name: Show Houses
item.help: Show houses on the map.

item.name: Show Pathing
item.help: Show blocking tiles.

item.name: Show Towns
item.help: Show temple positions.

item.name: Show Borders
item.help: Show ground border items on the map.

item.name: Show Walls
item.help: Show wall items on the map.

item.name: Show Wall Hooks
item.help: Show indicators for wall hooks.

item.name: Show Fishable Water
item.help: Show indicators for fishing spots.

item.name: Highlight Items
item.help: Highlight tiles with items on them.

item.name: Highlight Locked Doors
item.help: Highlight doors that require a key to open.

item.name: Go to Previous Position...
item.help: Go to the previous screen center position.

item.name: Go to Position...
item.help: Go to a specific XYZ position.

item.name: Jump to Brush...
item.help: Jump to a brush.

item.name: Jump to Item...
item.help: Jump to an item brush (RAW palette).

item.name: Select House Exit...
item.help: Activate Select Exit mode in House palette.

item.name: Find Item...
item.help: Find all instances of an item type on the map.

item.name: Find Creature...
item.help: Find all instances of a creature/monster on the map.

item.name: Find Everything
item.help: Find all unique/action/text/container items.

item.name: Find Unique
item.help: Find all items with a unique ID on the map.

item.name: Find Action
item.help: Find all items with an action ID on the map.

item.name: Find Container
item.help: Find all containers on the map.

item.name: Find Writeable
item.help: Find all writeable items on the map.

item.name: Find Duplicate Item
item.help: Find tiles that contain duplicate item IDs.

item.name: Find Key Hole Number
item.help: Find all doors with a key hole number on the map.

item.name: Find Door Level
item.help: Find all doors with a door level on the map.

item.name: Find Door Quest Number
item.help: Find all doors with a quest number on the map.

item.name: Find Door Quest Value
item.help: Find all doors with a quest value on the map.

item.name: Edit Towns
item.help: Edit towns.

item.name: Cleanup...
item.help: Removes all items that do not exist in the OTB file (red tiles the server cannot load).

item.name: Properties...
item.help: Show and change the map properties.

item.name: Statistics
item.help: Show map statistics.

item.name: Replace Items on Selection
item.help: Replace items on the selected area.

item.name: Find Item on Selection
item.help: Find items on the selected area.

item.name: Remove Item on Selection
item.help: Remove an item on the selected area.

item.name: Export Spawn Creatures...
item.help: Export creatures from each spawn in the selection to a text file with counts per spawn.

item.name: Find Everything
item.help: Find all unique/action/text/container items.

item.name: Find Unique
item.help: Find all items with a unique ID on the selected area.

item.name: Find Action
item.help: Find all items with an action ID on the selected area.

item.name: Find Container
item.help: Find all containers on the selected area.

item.name: Find Writeable
item.help: Find all writeable items on the selected area.

item.name: Find Duplicate Item
item.help: Find tiles that contain duplicate item IDs on the selected area.

item.name: Find Key Hole Number
item.help: Find all doors with a key hole number on the selected area.

item.name: Find Door Level
item.help: Find all doors with a door level on the selected area.

item.name: Find Door Quest Number
item.help: Find all doors with a quest number on the selected area.

item.name: Find Door Quest Value
item.help: Find all doors with a quest value on the selected area.

item.name: Compensate Selection
item.help: Compensate for floor difference when selecting.

item.name: Current Floor
item.help: Select only the current floor.

item.name: Lower Floors
item.help: Select all lower floors.

item.name: Visible Floors
item.help: Select only visible floors.

item.name: Minimap
item.help: Displays the minimap window.

item.name: New Palette
item.help: Creates a new palette.

item.name: Terrain
item.help: Select the Terrain palette.

item.name: Doodad
item.help: Select the Doodad palette.

item.name: Item
item.help: Select the Item palette.

item.name: House
item.help: Select the House palette.

item.name: Creature
item.help: Select the Creature palette.

item.name: RAW
item.help: Select the RAW palette.

item.name: Connect to Server...
item.help: Connect to a live map collaboration server.

item.name: Disconnect
item.help: Disconnect from the live collaboration server.

item.name: Run getTile Benchmark
item.help: Measure getTile() throughput on the current map (M3 performance baseline).
